rules.description: Avoid overly informal or disrespectful pronouns ('tu') in formal or corporate contexts. Use 'aap' instead.
Do not translate 'football' to 'futebol americano' when the context is clearly soccer (association football); use 'futebol'.
Use 'vos' conjugation instead of 'tú' for the second-person singular pronoun in colloquial Argentine dialogue.
Do not use 'coger' for grabbing or taking an object, as it is highly vulgar in Mexican slang. Use 'tomar' or 'agarrar'.
Translating idioms literally is incorrect; contextually map idioms to valid Indian equivalents (e.g., 'raining cats and dogs' -> 'musladhar barish').
